title: lithocarpus mindanaensis
intro: Lithocarpus mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao Lithocarpus or Bagtikan tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, native to the Philippines. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains tannins and other bioactive compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus mindanaensis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a promising natural remedy for managing diabetes, arthritis, and other diseases. Lithocarpus mindanaensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its bark in water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
